const USD_TO_INR=83;// Approximate conversion rate: 1 USD = 83 INR
export const convertToINR=usd=>{if(usd==null||isNaN(usd))return 0;return usd*USD_TO_INR;};export const formatINR=amount=>{if(amount==null||isNaN(amount))return'₹0.00';return"\u20B9".concat(Number(amount).toFixed(0));};export const convertToUSD=inr=>{if(inr==null||isNaN(inr))return 0;return inr/USD_TO_INR;};
